mapper.select: SELECT v.id AS value_id, v.case_data_set_id, v.field_config_id, f.step_id, f.field_scope, f.field_path, f.field_name, f.data_type, v.value, v.value_source, v.created_time, v.updated_time FROM case_field_value v INNER JOIN field_config f ON f.id = v.field_config_id AND f.deleted = 0 WHERE v.case_data_set_id = #{caseDataSetId} AND v.deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.step_id ASC, f.field_scope ASC, f.field_path ASC
